SEARCH
Package io.github.elevateddev.lattice.graph

Class GraphCompilationReport

java.lang.Object
io.github.elevateddev.lattice.graph.GraphCompilationReport
public final class GraphCompilationReport extends Object
Immutable build-time report explaining physical runtime decisions for a compiled graph.

The logical topology remains available through StaticGraph.plan(). This report describes how that topology was lowered into runtime workers, edges, senders, and merge decisions.

    Runtime edge-use categories.

    static final class

    static enum

    Returns edge decision rows in declaration order.

    Returns fallback decisions for candidates that did not merge.

    boolean
    hasFallbacks()
    Returns whether the compiler recorded any fallback explanations.
    boolean
    hasMerges()
    Returns whether the compiler applied at least one merge.
    static GraphCompilationReport
    logicalOnly(GraphPlan plan)
    Builds a logical-only report for non-Lattice StaticGraph implementations that expose a GraphPlan but no physical planner.

    merges()
    Returns positive merge decisions in deterministic owner order.

    Returns merge decisions owned by the given worker.

    Returns sender decision rows in deterministic edge order.

  • Constructor Details

    • GraphCompilationReport

      public GraphCompilationReport(String graphName, GraphCompilationReport.Controls controls, List<GraphCompilationReport.Worker> workers, List<GraphCompilationReport.Edge> edges, List<GraphCompilationReport.Sender> senders, List<GraphCompilationReport.Merge> merges, List<GraphCompilationReport.Fallback> fallbacks)
      Creates a compilation report from immutable row snapshots.

  • Method Details

    • graphName

      public String graphName()
      Returns the graph name.

    • controls

      public GraphCompilationReport.Controls controls()
      Returns graph-level controls that influenced compilation.

    • workers

      public List<GraphCompilationReport.Worker> workers()
      Returns worker decision rows in deterministic compilation order.

    • edges

      public List<GraphCompilationReport.Edge> edges()
      Returns edge decision rows in declaration order.

    • senders

      public List<GraphCompilationReport.Sender> senders()
      Returns sender decision rows in deterministic edge order.

    • merges

      public List<GraphCompilationReport.Merge> merges()
      Returns positive merge decisions in deterministic owner order.

    • fallbacks

      public List<GraphCompilationReport.Fallback> fallbacks()
      Returns fallback decisions for candidates that did not merge.

    • worker

      public Optional<GraphCompilationReport.Worker> worker(String name)
      Finds a worker decision by logical node name.

    • edge

      public Optional<GraphCompilationReport.Edge> edge(String from, String to)
      Finds an edge decision by source and target names.

    • mergesForOwner

      public List<GraphCompilationReport.Merge> mergesForOwner(String ownerName)
      Returns merge decisions owned by the given worker.

    • fallbacksFor

      public List<GraphCompilationReport.Fallback> fallbacksFor(String subject)
      Returns fallback decisions for the given subject.

    • hasMerges

      public boolean hasMerges()
      Returns whether the compiler applied at least one merge.

    • hasFallbacks

      public boolean hasFallbacks()
      Returns whether the compiler recorded any fallback explanations.

    • toSummaryString

      public String toSummaryString()
      Renders a concise human-readable summary.

      This output is intended for humans, examples, and support conversations. Machine consumers should use the structured rows instead.

    • logicalOnly

      public static GraphCompilationReport logicalOnly(GraphPlan plan)
      Builds a logical-only report for non-Lattice StaticGraph implementations that expose a GraphPlan but no physical planner.
